section.heading: Recordkeeping of loans by borrower’s gender

content.p: The Secretary shall classify, by gender, records of applicants for loans and loan guarantees under this chapter.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title III of Pub. L. 87–128, Aug. 8, 1961, 75 Stat. 307, known as the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title III to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 1921 of this title and Tables.
